title: B2B Data Ecosystems: 20% Infrastructure, 80% Behavioral Economics
summary: Building a B2B data pipeline? If you want partners to submit clean data, you have to build reciprocal incentives into the protocol itself.

title: Piloting AI Innovation in the Public Sector: From Hypothesis to 5,000 MAUs
summary: A deep dive into how we established cross-industry consensus and launched a full-stack AI chatbot at the Singapore Tourism Board that handled over 10,000 conversations.

title: From Data Analyst to Product Leader: Automating 50 Days of Ops
summary: How leveraging Python, Airflow, and Superset to solve immediate operational bottlenecks naturally paved the path toward formal product management strategies.
